'''Tar Mass''' was a rough neighborhood in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was where the [[Mo' Moolee Rah]] market was located. Walking the streets here would require adequate protection.
